project: omp-ado-auto-review — Automated PR Code Review Skill

stories.title: Create omp-ado-auto-review SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter and full workflow
acceptanceCriteria: skills/omp-ado-auto-review/SKILL.md exists with YAML frontmatter including name, description, WHEN/DO NOT USE FOR routing clauses
SKILL.md has Step 1: Load .omp/config.json for org/project/repo settings
SKILL.md has Step 2: Detect PRs where current user is reviewer using MCP repo_list_pull_requests_by_repo_or_project + core_get_identity_ids, with az CLI fallback
SKILL.md has Step 3: Fetch PR diff and changed files via az repos pr diff and az repos pr list (file-level)
SKILL.md has Step 4: Spawn code-reviewer agent to analyze changes, passing diff + file contents
SKILL.md has Step 5: Post findings as inline PR comment threads via repo_create_pull_request_thread with threadContext (file:line), with az CLI fallback
SKILL.md has Step 6: Optionally vote on PR based on severity (CRITICAL/HIGH -> reject/wait, MEDIUM/LOW -> approve with suggestions)
SKILL.md has MCP Tool Reference table and az CLI Fallback Commands section
SKILL.md has Error Handling table following omp-ado-review pattern

stories.title: Add listPRsForReviewer() and getPRDiff() methods to azure-devops provider
acceptanceCriteria: AzureDevOpsProvider has listPRsForReviewer(reviewerEmail: string, options?) method that calls az repos pr list --reviewer {email}
AzureDevOpsProvider has getPRDiff(prId: number, org?) method that calls az repos pr diff --id {prId} and returns diff string
Both methods throw typed AdoError on failure (using classifyError)
GitProvider interface in types.ts updated with optional listPRsForReviewer and getPRDiff methods
TypeScript compiles with no errors (npx tsc --noEmit)

stories.title: Register omp-ado-auto-review as a builtin skill
acceptanceCriteria: createBuiltinSkills() returns the new skill (count increases from 32 to 33)
getBuiltinSkill('omp-ado-auto-review') returns the skill with correct name, description, and template
listBuiltinSkillNames() includes 'omp-ado-auto-review' (canonical count 31 -> 32, with aliases 32 -> 33)
skills.test.ts updated with new expected counts and 'omp-ado-auto-review' in expectedSkills array

stories.title: Add unit tests for listPRsForReviewer() and getPRDiff()
acceptanceCriteria: azure-devops-extended.test.ts has tests for listPRsForReviewer: passes --reviewer flag, returns PRInfo[], throws AdoError on failure
azure-devops-extended.test.ts has tests for getPRDiff: passes --id flag, returns diff string, throws AdoError on failure
All new tests pass (npx vitest run src/__tests__/providers/azure-devops-extended.test.ts)

stories.title: Build and test verification
acceptanceCriteria: npx tsc --noEmit completes with zero errors
npm run build completes with exit code 0
npx vitest run completes with 0 test failures (pre-existing flaky test excluded)
